title: HF config.json parser
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

Need a serde struct to parse HuggingFace transformer config.json. Start with the union of fields needed by Llama 3 + common extensions:

hidden_size: usize
num_hidden_layers: usize
num_attention_heads: usize
num_key_value_heads: Option<usize> (default = num_attention_heads)
intermediate_size: usize
rms_norm_eps: f32 (default 1e-6)
rope_theta: f32 (default 10000.0)
max_position_embeddings: usize
vocab_size: usize
tie_word_embeddings: bool (default false)
hidden_act: String (expect 'silu' for Llama)
torch_dtype: String (e.g. 'bfloat16')
architectures: Vec<String>

Live in ferrotorch-hub/src/hf_config.rs (new file). Expose from ferrotorch-hub lib.rs. Don't reinvent AutoConfig's full dispatch; keep it as a flat HfTransformerConfig struct that downstream code maps to model-specific LlamaConfig/MistralConfig/etc.
